title: pilosella caespitosa subsp. stenocephala
intro: Pilosella caespitosa subsp. stenocephala, also known as the Alpine Mouse-ear, is a perennial herbaceous plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistamine effects. The health benefits of Pilosella caespitosa subsp. stenocephala include the relief of skin irritations, such as eczema and dermatitis, and the treatment of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and flatulence. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, where it is valued for its soothing and protective properties.
